description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Use the home solar savings calculator to size a system that offsets at least 80% of a $150 monthly electric bill for a home in ZIP 94110 and submit an online quote request for the recommended system.
tasks.name: Use the home solar savings calculator to size a system that offsets at least 80% of a $150 monthly electric bill for a home in ZIP 94110 and submit an online quote request for the recommended system.
tasks.description: Use the home solar savings calculator to size a system that offsets at least 80% of a $150 monthly electric bill for a home in ZIP 94110 and submit an online quote request for the recommended system.

tasks.instruction: From the shop, find solar garden lights priced under $30 with ratings of at least 4.0 stars, then add 4 units of the cheapest matching option to your cart.
tasks.name: From the shop, find solar garden lights priced under $30 with ratings of at least 4.0 stars, then add 4 units of the cheapest matching option to your cart.
tasks.description: From the shop, find solar garden lights priced under $30 with ratings of at least 4.0 stars, then add 4 units of the cheapest matching option to your cart.

tasks.instruction: Compare two residential rooftop solar packages priced at or below $12,000 and add to your cart the one with the longest warranty, using higher system size in kW to break any ties.
tasks.name: Compare two residential rooftop solar packages priced at or below $12,000 and add to your cart the one with the longest warranty, using higher system size in kW to break any ties.
tasks.description: Compare two residential rooftop solar packages priced at or below $12,000 and add to your cart the one with the longest warranty, using higher system size in kW to break any ties.

tasks.instruction: Use the consultation booking tool to schedule a 30-minute virtual consultation for a 1-story home on the next available Tuesday at around 3:00 PM and confirm the appointment with your contact details.
tasks.name: Use the consultation booking tool to schedule a 30-minute virtual consultation for a 1-story home on the next available Tuesday at around 3:00 PM and confirm the appointment with your contact details.
tasks.description: Use the consultation booking tool to schedule a 30-minute virtual consultation for a 1-story home on the next available Tuesday at around 3:00 PM and confirm the appointment with your contact details.

tasks.instruction: From the solar maintenance plans, select an annual plan that costs under $40 per month and proceed to the next step of checkout after entering your contact information.
tasks.name: From the solar maintenance plans, select an annual plan that costs under $40 per month and proceed to the next step of checkout after entering your contact information.
tasks.description: From the solar maintenance plans, select an annual plan that costs under $40 per month and proceed to the next step of checkout after entering your contact information.

tasks.instruction: In the commercial solar section, choose any system between 50 kW and 100 kW for a retail business in ZIP 75201 and submit a site assessment request with business and contact details.
tasks.name: In the commercial solar section, choose any system between 50 kW and 100 kW for a retail business in ZIP 75201 and submit a site assessment request with business and contact details.
tasks.description: In the commercial solar section, choose any system between 50 kW and 100 kW for a retail business in ZIP 75201 and submit a site assessment request with business and contact details.

tasks.instruction: Use the solar + storage bundle configurator to build a system with roughly 6 kW of solar and at least 10 kWh of battery storage, then pick the financing option with the lowest monthly payment below $200 and continue to the order review.
tasks.name: Use the solar + storage bundle configurator to build a system with roughly 6 kW of solar and at least 10 kWh of battery storage, then pick the financing option with the lowest monthly payment below $200 and continue to the order review.

tasks.instruction: In the learning center, save 3 articles about solar incentives published after early 2023 to your reading list or bookmarks.

tasks.instruction: Use the home solar savings tools to run a 20-year savings comparison for buying versus leasing solar for a home with a $180 monthly bill in ZIP 80210, then start a contact form for whichever option shows higher total savings and submit your name and email.
